title: sweech doctor: per-check timeouts + daemon health probe
description: sweech doctor can hang indefinitely on network checks and does not probe daemon health.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 4: "sweech doctor adds per-check timeouts + daemon health probe"

acceptanceCriteria: Every network check has a 5s timeout; reported as "timeout" not "hung"
Daemon /healthz probed and surfaced as a separate row
Exit code reflects worst result (0=all good, 1=warnings, 2=errors)
